DEFENDANT POLLY ESTHER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER REQUIRING AND FIXING AMOUNT OF DISCRETIONARY UNDERTAKING TO STAY ENFORCEMENT ON APPEAL., GRANTED. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT SHALL POST A BOND WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00 WITHIN 15 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THIS ORDER, AND ONCE SAID BOND AMOUNT IS POSTED, THIS MATTER WILL BE STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE APPEAL.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Arthur C. Lipton, Esq. for Plaintiff: Louis Martinez, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Polly's Esther's of San Francisco, LLC. as follows:
Damages $55,000.00
Special Damages $8,685.94
Wages $8,685.94
Costs $535.50, for a total of $65,874.24
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Continued To Aug-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
